note.en: As [[character:nicole]] snapshots her own Attack when pressing [[ability:skill]], it is advised to attack a few times before using [[ability:skill]] to benefit from this weapon's passive.
While not contributing a lot to high Attack, this weapon provides a reliable Damage Bonus to your onfielder.
In teams where this weapon's passive becomes applicable, it increases in value and appreciates refinements.
This weapon can have significantly more value if the teams [[stat:er]] requirements are dire.

This weapon severely reduces the potency of [[character:nicole]]'s buff, but brings a hefty buff of its own to the onfielder. Depending on the team, this weapon can be one of [[character:nicole]]'s best choices.
